speaker: speaker1
text: It looks like it may rain soon .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , and I hope that it does .

speaker: speaker2
text: I really love how rain clears the air .

speaker: speaker1
text: Me too . It always smells so fresh after it rains .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , but I love the night air after it rains .

speaker: speaker2
text: Because you can see the stars perfectly .

speaker: speaker1
text: I really hope it rains today .
